images.title: Pocket Ledger
images.subtitle: Quick intro before the tour: this app helps make bill tracking less stressful.

images.title: Bills on repeat? You are covered.
images.subtitle: Track monthly, bi-weekly, and weekly bills without overthinking it.

images.title: Log every payment, even partial ones.
images.subtitle: Paid half today and the rest later? That is easy to track here.

images.title: Tap paid and move on.
images.subtitle: One click marks the bill paid and pushes the due date forward.

images.title: See what needs attention fast.
images.subtitle: Status tags make it obvious what is paid, due soon, or overdue.

images.title: Find bills in seconds.
images.subtitle: Use search and quick filters so you can focus on the right list.

images.title: Monthly view, zero guesswork.
images.subtitle: Open calendar mode and spot busy due-date weeks at a glance.

images.title: Quick money snapshot.
images.subtitle: Check due this month, overdue amount, and total paid right away.

images.title: Made a mistake? Undo it.
images.subtitle: Accidental delete or edit can be reversed in one tap.

images.title: Backup your data anytime.
images.subtitle: Export JSON backups and restore with built-in validation checks.

images.title: Same data on phone and web.
images.subtitle: Sign in once and keep your records synced across devices.

images.title: Account recovery without panic.
images.subtitle: Recovery code and password tools are there when you need them.

images.title: Set it up your way.
images.subtitle: Customize notifications, compact mode, and install it like an app.
